{{Quote|Master Windu still fights on Dantooine.|Palpatine|<ref name="CW1">{{CW|1}}</ref>}}
The '''Battle of Dantooine''' took place during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. One phase was fought on the grassy plains of [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]], pitting a small unit of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] against a massive number of [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]], while a later phase was fought at the same [[Time/Legends|time]] as the [[Second Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Second Battle of Geonosis]].

==Prelude==
The Battle of Dantooine began immediately before the [[Battle of Muunilinst/Legends|Battle of Muunilinst]]. During said battle, the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] used [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] as a staging point to launch an attack against the [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|assault ship]] blockade around the [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan]] headquarters. However, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] learned of the Confederate presence on Dantooine, and left with a force of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] to halt the progress of the Separatists.

[[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] was also hoping to uncover [[Rakata/Legends|Rakatan]] artifacts on the planet.<ref name="Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

Mace Windu's secondary mission on the planet was to locate and apprehend the mad [[Geneticist/Legends|genetic]] [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorist]] [[Zeta Magnus]]. Zeta had committed multiple acts of murder and terrorism around the galaxy while in league with the Separatists. He operated a [[GeNode]] cloning facility [[Jedi Enclave|somewhere]] on the planet that persistently eluded Master Windu.<ref name="Skyewalkers">''[[SkyeWalkers: A Clone Wars Story]]''</ref> 

==The Battle==
{{Quote|Ah, yes, I understand that congratulations are in order, General Windu. You have been most successful to date with your facet of the war. Your work on Dantooine was exceptional, I hear.|Lanius Qel-Bertuk|<ref name="Conversation in Shadow">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/livingforce/swlf20040729|text=Conversation in Shadow|int=Conversation in Shadow}}</ref>}}
[[File:Seismic_tank_attacks.jpg|thumb|left|180px|The seismic tank attacks the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Clone Army]].]]

The battle erupted on Dantooine as clones and [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]] clashed in a vast, open plain. Clones used [[PLX-1/Legends|PLX-1 portable missile launcher]] to destroy scores of droids, whereas the droids used their own missile launchers to shoot down many gunships and overwhelming numbers to cause many casualties in the clone ranks. However, with Master Windu at their side, the clones slowly gained the upper hand, despite being outnumbered nearly four to one by Confederate super battle droids. However, the battle was suddenly turned upside down with the arrival of a large siege weapon—the [[Seismic tank/Legends|seismic tank]].

[[File:CW_Chapter_12.png|thumb|left|180px|[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] battles [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]].]]
This tank used its seismic driver—used for mining operations in peaceful days—to cut a swath through the clone trooper ranks, either crushing them outright or sending soldiers flying from the shockwave, along with taking out a contingent of their own forces. In the confusion, Windu lost his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], and was forced to fight a number of droids unarmed. The ability with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] that he showed in that battle has since become legendary: During the fight, he eluded and obliterated droids by multiple Force moves as the [[Telekinesis/Legends|Force push]], [[Force speed/Legends|Force speed]], [[Force punch]] and [[Telekinesis/Legends|Force Wave]], a technique so powerful it incapacitated droids within a 50-meter radius, and at one point, Windu disassembled a super battle droid and used its pieces to destroy the other remaining droids.

Retrieving his lightsaber amid another seismic shockwave, Windu flew towards the seismic tank. Windu cut his way in, disabled the seismic driver, destroyed the tank's droid crew by pushing the crew out the window, and knocked out the controls. Flying clear, Windu watched on as the seismic tank smashed into the ground and exploded. After he landed, a [[Paxi Sylo|small boy]] gave him a bottle of water. The battle was won.

===Attack on the failed Jedi students===
A taskforce of droids was dispatched during the battle to attack a farm that was run by failed Jedi students. With the help of their Force powers and their [[Bantha/Legends|banthas]], the former Jedi were able to defeat their attackers, despite their lack of weapons. Afterward, they fled the planet in their airship and decided to fly it to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="Graduation Day" />

===Later assault===
Following another phase of the battle fought around the same time as the [[Second Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Second Battle of Geonosis]], Windu's remaining troops required medical supplies, leading Jedi [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]] [[Barriss Offee/Legends|Barriss Offee]] and [[Ahsoka Tano/Legends|Ahsoka Tano]] to take a [[TB-73/Legends|medical frigate]] to collect the supplies from a [[Ord Cestus medical station/Legends|medical station]] near [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]]. However, their ship was [[Skirmish aboard TB-73/Legends|overrun]] by a batch of [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosian]] [[Brain worm/Legends|brain worms]] before they could complete the supply run.<ref name="Brain Invaders">{{TCW|Brain Invaders}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The Battle of Dantooine<ref name="NEC" /> was created for the ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' television micro-series. It later received a mention in "[[Brain Invaders]]," an episode of the ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'' television series.<ref name="Brain Invaders" />

==Appearances==
[[File:Mace_Windu_during_the_Battle_of_Dantooine.jpg|250px|thumb|Mace Windu using his [[Form VII/Legends|mastery]] with the [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] to destroy the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|droids]] on Dantooine.]]
